issues.title: 熔斷解除條件仍是唯一即時部署阻塞點
issues.action: 先把即時部署阻塞語義切回熔斷解除條件；在熔斷未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主阻塞。 最近 50 筆需至少 15 勝，當前 0 勝，還差 15 勝；同時連續虧損必須 < 50。
issues.next_action: 先把即時部署阻塞語義切回熔斷解除條件；在熔斷未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主阻塞。 最近 50 筆需至少 15 勝，當前 0 勝，還差 15 勝；同時連續虧損必須 < 50。

issues.title: Train-CV gap = 17.4pp (65.6% vs 48.2%)
issues.action: 更正則化: 增加 reg_alpha/reg_lambda; 減少 max_depth; 或減少特徵數

issues.title: live predictor decision-quality contract is runtime-blocked by recent pathology, a toxic exact live lane, or a severe narrowed pathology lane
issues.action: 把 hb_predict_probe 納入每輪 heartbeat 驗證，對 exact live lane、當前 calibration scope 與 worst narrowed scope 做 root-cause drill-down；優先檢查 exact lane 是否仍是 ALLOW 但 canonical true-negative share 已偏高，並交叉比對 recent same-scope / narrowed-scope 4H shifts、scope selection、與 execution guardrail 是否只是正確地把壞 pocket 擋下。 live_scope=regime_gate, regime=bear/CAUTION, label=D, sample_size=223, window=100, alerts=['label_imbalance'], expected_win_rate=0.2, expected_pnl=-0.0052, expected_quality=-0.0879, layers=1→0, top_shifts=feat_4h_dist_swing_low(0.7615→0.3835)/feat_4h_dist_bb_lower(1.2729→1.0314)/feat_4h_bb_pct_b(0.4235→0.3412), exact_live_lane=(rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None), scope_matrix=regime_label+regime_gate+entry_quality_label:rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None,alerts=['no_rows']; issues.title: leaderboard comparable rows are back; keep the recent-window contract stable and cron-safe
issues.next_action: Keep /api/models/leaderboard and Strategy Lab aligned on latest bounded walk-forward plus the recent-two-year backtest policy; do not regress to placeholder-only or ambiguous backtest windows.

issues.title: q15 exact support under minimum after semantic rebaseline while breaker is active (0/50)
issues.action: Treat legacy supported rows as reference-only: keep support_identity/regression_basis/legacy_supported_reference visible in probe/API/UI/docs, keep the current-live exact-support blocker open, and do not describe this as same-identity support regression unless the semantic signature matches.
